.navbar.universal-nav .nav-menu .nav-lin.declarations:
padding: calc(var(--nav-spacing-md) * 0.75) var(--nav-spacing-md);
    transition: color var(--nav-transition-fast);

html body.contact-page main#main-content.selector: html body.contact-page main#main-content section.contact-section div.slds-container_large div.slds-grid div.slds-col div.contact-form-container h2

.fnf-logo:hover.declarations:
transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.02);
    filter: drop-shadow(0 6px 24px rgba(16, 179, 255, 0.35));

.custom-footer a.declarations:
color: var(--fnf-accent-color);
    transition: color var(--slds-c-transition-medium) ease;
